caption: A man sits in a recording studio, wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hoodie featuring the gold text "BOSS TALK". He is seated behind a dark desk equipped with a professional microphone on a boom arm and a black container with red and white text that reads "THE TALK OUT". In the background, a white wall displays a repeating logo consisting of five gold stars and the words "UNICORN HUSTLE", while a blue banner above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". The man is captured in a mid-shot, looking slightly to his left as if engaging in a conversation. Throughout the sequence, he remains in the same position, though his facial expression shifts slightly and he moves his head and gaze as he speaks, while his right hand rests on the desk, showing a gold watch on his wrist.
